# Harini M M — SDE Candidate | IoT & ML Systems | Problem Solver
# https://harinimm.dev

## Who I Am
Harini M M is a pre-final year Computer Science and Business Systems student (8.23 CGPA) at
PSNA College of Engineering and Technology, Dindigul. She has hands-on experience in full-stack
development, IoT systems, and machine learning integration, seeking an SDE role.

## What I Build
- Full-stack web applications with HTML5, CSS, JavaScript, REST APIs
- IoT systems with Arduino, ESP32, and sensor networks
- ML-powered anomaly detection and classification systems
- Automated irrigation and monitoring systems
- Responsive web apps with real-time tracking

## Featured Projects
- Eduflex: Adaptive Learning Path Scheduler with ~30% load time reduction
- Bee Hive Monitoring: IoT + ML pipeline with 92% anomaly detection accuracy
- Smart Agriculture: Automated irrigation achieving ~35% water usage reduction
- Smart Gravity Water Filter: IoT water quality monitoring with ~70% effort reduction

## Tech Stack
Languages: Java, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS, Embedded C
Frontend: Responsive Design, Figma (Beginner), Wireframing, Canva
Backend: REST APIs, Spring Boot (Fundamentals), MySQL, MongoDB
IoT & Hardware: Arduino, ESP32, IoT Sensors
Tools & DevOps: Git, Postman, VS Code, UiPath (RPA)
Concepts: OOP, Data Structures, Agile, SDLC, Anomaly Detection, Automation

## Experience
- Secretary — PSNACET Automation Club (2024-2025)
- Mentored 30+ peers on RPA and automation concepts
